{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320145642AF5A50073E1B530390F5"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7541023539699860248","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"贫道一生清贫，常以白粥就咸菜，靠胡扯混日子，本以为此生难有知音。谁知开书七日，竟有七百余位道友误入柴房，端坐蒲团，听贫道胡扯，经脉俱张，神游天外，贫道感激涕零，几欲当场破戒痛饮。

尤记那日，明媚小师妹要择良配，不想半数道友义无反顾，纷纷点下“追更”二字，以示心迹，场面之盛，堪比比武招亲。

而今更有道友慷慨解囊，托番茄快马送来十五金铢，贫道捧在手中，心里直打鼓：你们看书便已是天大的恩典，竟还舍财助我，这叫贫道如何安睡？

然则——既蒙道友错爱，贫道只得加紧胡扯，誓不负诸君金票与追更！倘若有朝一日真能飞升，那必是靠诸位道友的一路“点赞”托举。","text_exts":[{"e":101,"s":98,"text":"小师妹","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E5%B8%88%E5%A6%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773989803530390F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227541023539699860248%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227537561500068629528%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E5%B8%88%E5%A6%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755785818,"group_id":"7537561500068629528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不恋红尘，只恋修仙。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8tmViNPkidHNcBwzqSxqv8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9946dacf38c2446588ab47dd3492fbb7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537160&x-signature=73MU4ohPF6NHHGQzeX%2B92gOhOgM%3D","user_id":"5447314638","user_name":"胡扯掌门"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5447314638","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7537561500068629528","book_info":{"abstract":"多女主｜双修｜轻松搞笑｜无厘头｜仙侠恋爱喜剧｜养成系女尸
秦长生，秦家庄出了名的废柴——不是那种“潜力股”的废柴，而是那种连狗见了都要绕道走、怕耽误狗生的废柴。
爹娘早亡，出身卑微，日常是被人踩、被人骑、偶尔还被人踹的“全能受气包”。按理说，这辈子也就挑挑水、扫扫地，娶个媳妇种种田，安安分分等老。
可天不遂人愿——或者说，天偏要找点乐子。
一场灵根测试，让他从“人见人踩”摇身一变成了……修仙界百年难遇的稀有灵根，就这样，秦长生被送进天玄宗。
别人穿上仙袍是飞升之路的起点，
秦长生穿上仙袍，却是去刷锅、扫地、喂猪。
这是一个从最卑微的位置，靠演技、实力和一点点运气，一步步逆天改命的故事。
这里有仙门内斗，有江湖恩怨，有佳人美眷，也有一群等着看他笑话的人……直到有一天，他们才发现，这个他们眼中的“杂役”，已经站在了所有人的前面。
——从挑水劈柴，到笑傲仙途，
这是一部让你笑着看完的修仙爽文！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/29e7adc2daae7a2c44331d2d53f7e42e","author":"胡扯掌门","author_id":"","book_id":"7537561500068629528","book_name":"废材也成仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b0a0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7537562915423928856","read_count":"335","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1047278"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"447","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o74bffeaca8f7a2d7d07d69787a905292~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173803&x-signature=IMb1nAXzODQ4mg2QUOh7IcI73xE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"5447314638","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320145642AF5A50073E1B530390F5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13040,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":864},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1760958170,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582575087775220505","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然不是很好，看到了14章，再次提醒写手，怕老婆是没有出息的！但最后还是给你五星"},"content_type":0,"create_tim
